title: Mexican Pack
description: The best Mexican Texture Pack actually
body:
For the moment it is still an incomplete and experimental version, there may be several bugs and missing things, I'm still working on it.

IMPORTANT NOTE: The texture is made for Español (México) because it contains personalized texts in this language

You want to feel a true Mexican experience in a texture, full of references to things about Mexico as well as funny texture, then the Mexican Pack is for you. Try all the great changes that the Mexican Pack has as well as being able to contribute new ideas, changes or even be part of this great project

Mexican Pack is a texture based on Mexican Culture, made in a satirical way. includes several changes to models, sounds, texts, blocks, etc. The resolution of the texture is 64x64 and it is made with original material and with the GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE 3.0 license, so you are free to make a fork of the project as long as you use the same license for it

![Mexican Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b32fba8ab9c22bea5f7b81f1a493ece3770a064a.png)
![Mexican Pack Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/474bc2ad25b1b133026d1c9b1e418cf7aee69d33.png)

**Mexican Pack Features:**

The texture includes a huge variety of changes, such as quite large changes to the game, as well as unique functions in the game that make the playing experience more fun and complete.
- 1000 Mexican Splashes
- New logo
- Amazing Panorama

![Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c51b4fec5a23476cfd5fb4b17d1b812c0dca0b86.png)


- **(NEW) Quetzalcoatl**

Quetzalcoalt, an important pre-Hispanic god, now replaces the Ender Dragon.


![Quetzalcoalt Model In-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b6afdff021ced213fbf416fdac20d168d04aad3.png)


- **(EXPERIMENTAL) NEW BEDS**

Although only the white, red, black and yellow beds have been changed, its model has been changed completely, adding something as Mexican as the call (Cobija Del Tigre) and a famous Mexican team bed.

![New Beds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6f82c64b658bc09404c14a5767ec4acb663b405.png)


- **(NEW) The Sun Of Mexico "Luismi"**

Now the sun of Mexico will be with you, a famous singer named Luismi will be warming the sun on the beach.

![Luismi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66c98f323cdd70d9962f254c41930b80f2b58a20.png)

- **(NEW) Mama Peleadora (The champion of low prices)**

Now if the Warden and Ancient City are really scary at such low prices.

![Mama Peleadora](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/405d2c3735d6682cbcce973d01d4f78439b58093.png)

- **(NEW) Osito Panadero with a delicius bread**

The best bear baker in the whole world, but still very Mexican

![Osito Panadero](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fd26f7e4530db15467f8d00550815e91f7877f1.png)

- **(NEW) Lava Replaced With Beans, Yeah Beans**

You read that right, replace the lava with literally burning beans, unbelievable isn't it?

![Lava Beans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2565fc90bc14fd033fe0ff2bb8ece8bf3af10c8.png)

- **Modified Mobs**
  
- Now several mobs were modified to more Mexican versions
- Now exist the Mexican Creeper
- Wolf has been replaced with aa Generic Mexican Dog
- The Iron Golem is a famous mexican doctor

![Mob1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/447ea05eb6e5b6162887df0ac1b074296224b927.png)
![Mob2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e126ad350bb114258eeeae2ff790eb6119542ff7.png)

- **(NEW) Several Changes In Various Items**

As part of the 0.3 PRE RELEASE, several items have been changed.

- New Egg Spawn Item
- Some meats have been modified to tacos, or chicken in salsa en verde.
  
![Egg Spawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a630736ae9cbc703049d039deddb7253209efbd.png)
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5510745cd7ce9ff25fa7151e0ef0261e2d4f28a6.png)


- **(NEW) TRAJINERAS**

That's right, this is real even if it seems a little difficult, TRAJINERAS IN MINECRAFT
- All boats have been replaced by trajineras as well as their items.
- Chest boats have been partially replaced

![Trajineras](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b9544f69b21074b8939c54ce8d4afbf630fd112.png)

- **(NEW) Mexican Paintings**

More than 25 new paintings, no joke and the best thing is their incredible quality.
- Representative paintings in Mexico
- Many references to Mexican culture

![Mexican Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/181944c0497844e007a45a49fb2393e938e85557.png)

- **Funny Death Messeges**

Much of the texts were modified as well as the death screen and the texts that appear
- All death messages has been edited
- Only works in Español (México)

![Death Message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0df3aa3e3c0c24ff0ceda2c4c7ef046d1a14c09f.png)

- **Replace Items**

Several Minecraft items have been replaced to a more Mexican Style
- Bread replaced with Bolillo
- Swords has been replaced with Machetes

![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc30706e79f5999d7a148d8627030f760b166f2d.png)

- **Added Recorder (Flauta Dulce), Very Common in Mexico**

The recorder is widely used in Mexican schools, that is why it has been added to the Mexican Pack
- Goat horn is replaced with Recorder
- Custom songs in recorder

![Flauta Dulce](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c12c5e6e693b6430df189d527a7a5a00a76fa5bc.png)

At the moment that is all that is added, in the very near future the texture will be updated as quickly as possible, you can also check the progress in real time on GitHub or contribute new ideas that you have in my Discord, remember that this texture is free and always will be, thanks for supporting my proyect :3
